description: Structured information on a research project.
label: Project
name: Project

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/contrib._instruction: Add all individual, organisational, or consortial contributions to this project.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/contrib.label: Contribution
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/contrib.name: contribution

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/descrip._instruction: Enter a description of this project.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/descrip.description: Longer statement or account giving the characteristics of someone or something.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/descrip.label: Description
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/descrip.name: description

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/fullNam._instruction: Enter a descriptive full name (or title) for this project.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/fullNam.description: Whole, non-abbreviated name of something or somebody.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/fullNam.label: Full name
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/fullNam.name: fullName

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/hasPart._instruction: Add all research product (versions) that are part of this project.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/hasPart.label: Has part
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/hasPart.name: hasPart

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/homepag._instruction: Enter the internationalized resource identifier (IRI) to the homepage of this project.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/homepag.description: Main website of something or someone.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/homepag.label: Homepage
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/homepag.name: homepage

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/shortNa._instruction: Enter a short name (or alias) for this project that could be used as a shortened display title (e.g., for web services with too little space to display the full name).
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/shortNa.description: Shortened or fully abbreviated name of something or somebody.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/shortNa.label: Short name
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/shortNa.name: shortName

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type._instruction: Add the type of this project (e.g., research project, grant project).
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type.description: Distinct class to which a group of entities or concepts with similar characteristics or attributes belong to.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type.label: Type
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type.name: type
